name: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, inconsistent vendor performance tracking causes missed opportunities for cost savings. We provide automated performance reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.

problem_solved: Inconsistent vendor performance tracking leads to missed opportunities for cost savings and compliance issues.
